ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Reset To Jan-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
See also case #542501.
Petitioner: Daisy Gabbay, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and pending matter is case #542501, matter is continued to Jan. 12, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
